name: pane-on-g2
tagline: Mirror tmux panes to Even Realities G2
description: Mirror parallel Claude Code (or any tmux pane) to Even Realities G2 smart glasses. Companion text input, ring quick replies, optional audio transcription via Whisper.
author: Toru Hosokawa

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Stream tmux pane snapshots from the user's self-hosted pane-on-g2 server. Whitelist covers Tailscale (100.x, *.ts.net), LAN (192.168.x, 10.x, 172.x), and localhost so users can self-host without rebuilding.

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: Capture voice input on temple single-tap toggle for Whisper-transcribed prompts.
